'''Yavin 6''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]]<ref name="SWAM9" /> located in the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]] of the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]], within the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was one of the twenty-six moons that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin Prime]]. The [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Yavin Bypass/Legends|Yavin Bypass]] connected it to the [[Krylon system/Legends|Krylon]] and [[Vaal system/Legends|Vaal systems]].<ref name="TEA" /> Yavin 6 was uninhabitable.<ref name="Falcon">{{BuildFalconCite|7|Guide to the Galaxy}}</ref>

{{Moon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Yavin 6 was introduced in the [[2003]] article "[[Quiz Attack!]]," which was written by [[David Levithan]] and published in the [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 9|ninth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Adventures Magazine]]''.<ref name="SWAM9" />
